## Summary
Brief description of changes.

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] No `innerHTML` with dynamic data (use `textContent` / `createElement`)
- [ ] IIFE module pattern followed (if adding/modifying JS)
- [ ] `build.sh` updated (if adding a new JS/CSS module)
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Tested in both dark and light mode
- [ ] i18n keys added to both `en.json` and `fr.json` (if adding UI text)

If applicable.
